parameters.query:
SELECT *
FROM public.fn_select_pedido_reutilizable(
  '{{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.telefono }}',
  '{{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.session_id }}',
  '{{ String($('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.pedido_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  false,
  {{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.restaurante_id }}
)

SELECT delivery_zone_id, zone_name, postal_code, fee, min_order_amount, estimated_minutes_min, estimated_minutes_max, is_active
FROM public.delivery_zone
WHERE is_active = true
  AND (postal_code = '{{ (() => { const t = $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json; const src = [t.codigo_postal, t.direccion_texto].filter(Boolean).join(' '); const m = String(src).match(/\b\d{5}\b/); return m ? m[0] : ''; })() }}'
       OR (
         lower(zone_name) = lower('{{ (() => { const t = $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json; const txt = String([t.codigo_postal, t.direccion_texto].filter(Boolean).join(' ')).toLowerCase(); if (txt.includes('arrecife')) return 'Arrecife'; if (txt.includes('playa honda')) return 'Playa Honda'; if (txt.includes('taiche')) return 'Taiche'; return ''; })() }}')
         AND '{{ String($('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.zona_confirmada_por_cliente || 'false') }}' = 'true'
       ))
LIMIT 1

UPDATE pedidos
SET
  tipo_despacho = 'delivery',
  direccion = '{{ String($json.direccion || '').replace(/''/g, "''") }}',
  lat = {{ $json.lat !== null ? $json.lat : 'NULL' }},
  lng = {{ $json.lng !== null ? $json.lng : 'NULL' }},
  postal_code = NULLIF('{{ String($json.codigo_postal || "") }}', ''),
  costo_envio = {{ Number($json.fee || 0) }},
  total = {{ Number($json.total || 0) }},
  tiempo_estimado = COALESCE(
    NULLIF((SELECT trim(config_value) FROM public.restaurante_config WHERE config_key = 'delivery_eta_text' AND restaurante_id = {{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.restaurante_id }} LIMIT 1), ''),
    (
      COALESCE(NULLIF((SELECT trim(config_value) FROM public.restaurante_config WHERE config_key = 'delivery_eta_min_minutes' AND restaurante_id = {{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.restaurante_id }} LIMIT 1), ''), '{{ Number($json.tiempo_min || 30) }}')
      || '-' ||
      COALESCE(NULLIF((SELECT trim(config_value) FROM public.restaurante_config WHERE config_key = 'delivery_eta_max_minutes' AND restaurante_id = {{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.restaurante_id }} LIMIT 1), ''), '{{ Number($json.tiempo_max || 45) }}')
      || ' min'
    )
  ),
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $json.pedido_id }}
RETURNING *,
  (SELECT datos_bancarios FROM restaurante WHERE id = pedidos.restaurante_id LIMIT 1) AS datos_bancarios

UPDATE pedidos
SET
  tipo_despacho = 'retiro',
  direccion = NULL,
  lat = NULL,
  lng = NULL,
  costo_envio = 0,
  total = subtotal,
  tiempo_estimado = COALESCE(
    NULLIF((SELECT trim(config_value) FROM public.restaurante_config WHERE config_key = 'pickup_eta_text' AND restaurante_id = {{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.restaurante_id }} LIMIT 1), ''),
    (
      COALESCE(NULLIF((SELECT trim(config_value) FROM public.restaurante_config WHERE config_key = 'pickup_eta_minutes' AND restaurante_id = {{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.restaurante_id }} LIMIT 1), ''), '20')
      || ' min'
    )
  ),
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $json.pedido_id }}
RETURNING *,
  (SELECT datos_bancarios FROM restaurante WHERE id = pedidos.restaurante_id LIMIT 1) AS datos_bancarios

UPDATE public.usuarios
SET direccion_frecuente = '{{ String($('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.direccion_texto || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', updated_at = NOW()
WHERE telefono = '{{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.telefono }}'
  AND lower('{{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.tipo || '' }}') IN ('delivery','domicilio')
RETURNING id, telefono, nombre, direccion_frecuente

UPDATE pedidos
SET
  tipo_despacho = 'delivery',
  direccion = '{{ String($json.direccion || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  lat = {{ $json.lat !== null ? $json.lat : 'NULL' }},
  lng = {{ $json.lng !== null ? $json.lng : 'NULL' }},
  costo_envio = {{ Number($json.fee || 0) }},
  total = {{ Number($json.total || 0) }},
  tiempo_estimado = COALESCE(
    NULLIF((SELECT trim(config_value) FROM public.restaurante_config WHERE config_key = 'delivery_eta_text' LIMIT 1), ''),
    (
      COALESCE(NULLIF((SELECT trim(config_value) FROM public.restaurante_config WHERE config_key = 'delivery_eta_min_minutes' LIMIT 1), ''), '{{ Number($json.tiempo_min || 30) }}')
      || '-' ||
      COALESCE(NULLIF((SELECT trim(config_value) FROM public.restaurante_config WHERE config_key = 'delivery_eta_max_minutes' LIMIT 1), ''), '{{ Number($json.tiempo_max || 45) }}')
      || ' min'
    )
  ),
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $json.pedido_id }}
RETURNING *

UPDATE public.usuarios
SET direccion_frecuente = '{{ String($('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.direccion_texto || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', updated_at = NOW()
WHERE telefono = '{{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.telefono }}'
  AND lower('{{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.tipo || '' }}') IN ('delivery','domicilio')
RETURNING id, telefono, nombre, direccion_frecuente

INSERT INTO public.escalaciones
  (restaurante_id, telefono, problema, contexto, conversation_id, account_id, contact_id, tipo_escalacion, estado)
VALUES (
  {{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.restaurante_id }},
  '{{ $input.first().json.telefono.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $input.first().json.problema_escalacion.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{"subflujo": "Despacho", "tipo": "error_sistema"}'::jsonb,
  '', '', '', 'error_sistema', 'pendiente'
)
